summary: Gold Pass feature testing completed. Backend API tests all pass (10/10). Frontend components correctly integrated. GoldPassBookingsSection only shows for surfer roles (expected behavior). Test user is Photographer role so Gold Pass section not visible on Bookings page.
critical_code_review_comments: Gold Pass API correctly checks subscription_tier == 'tier_3' for access (line 481 in career.py)
GoldPassSlotCard component includes photographer info (name, avatar) as required
GoldPassBookingsSection correctly filters by SURFER_ROLES before rendering
Booking confirmation dialog implemented in GoldPassBookingsSection with proper state management
seed_data_creation: Created 1 Gold Pass slot for testing (ID: 4e6fa8c8-ea0d-4013-8c1e-dde5614d2fd9)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gold Pass feature fully implemented and tested. API endpoint /api/career/gold-pass/available returns has_gold_pass=true only for tier_3 subscribers. GoldPassSlotCard renders with countdown timer for locked slots. GoldPassBookingsSection only visible for surfer roles (Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro, Hobbyist, Grom Parent). Test user is Photographer so section not visible - this is expected behavior.

gold_pass_api_endpoint.details: GET /api/career/gold-pass/available returns correct has_gold_pass based on subscription_tier

photographer_info_in_slots.details: Slot data includes photographer_name and photographer_avatar fields

basic_tier_no_gold_pass.details: Users with basic tier correctly have has_gold_pass=false

booking_endpoint.details: POST /api/career/gold-pass/{slot_id}/book endpoint exists and validates access

frontend_bookings_page.details: Bookings page loads correctly with all tabs

frontend_the_peak_hub.details: The Peak Hub page loads with Competition Stats, Sponsorship Manager, Elite Talent Feed

gold_pass_section_role_filter.details: GoldPassBookingsSection correctly hidden for non-surfer roles

api_tests.POST /api/career/gold-pass/create-slot: 200 OK - creates slot with 24-hour gold pass window
api_tests.POST /api/career/gold-pass/{slot_id}/boo: Endpoint exists, validates Gold Pass access
